releases.notes:
D7TUN6 :: A Path of Static Snow
////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////

1. Acid Tears 01:45
2. Dr. Star 02:52
3. Drag Den 01:47
4. unnamed012 05:05
5. Crying Witches 04:41
6. Winter Walk 05:21

### about

first release by D7TUN6.

////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////

who:

all - written and produced by D7TUN6 between 2024-2025.

cover art: snowy path captured on Philips Xenium X500's crappy digital camera, 07:00 AM.

////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////

software and hardware used:

reaper audacity lmms
zynaddsubfx tripleoscillator twin2 vital serum reasynth odin2
valhalla fabfilter
nixos

philips_xenium_x500
ugreen_usb_dac kz_edc_pro sennheiser_hd206

### credits

will be released on 20.12.25 (streamings)
released 17.12.25 (bandcamp)

### license

all rights reserved
